front.title: PSI-01: Zero-Knowledge Method for Ventilation Air Methane Destruction Verification under Safeguard Mechanism

abstract.t: This document specifies PSI-01, a zero-knowledge method for proving Ventilation Air Methane (VAM) thermal destruction to satisfy Australia's Carbon Credits (Carbon Farming Initiative—Coal Mine Waste Gas) Methodology Determination 2026, Clause 20A.
